item.title: Decide
item.description: Markdown Template This is a template demonstrating various Markdown syntax elements. Headings Heading 3 Heading 4 Heading 5 Heading 6 Emphasis italic or italic bold or bold italic and bold or italic and bold Lists Unordered List: Item 1 Item 2 Subitem A Subitem B Item 3 Ordered List: First Item Second Item Third Item Links Visit OpenAI Visit Google Images Blockquotes This is a blockquote. Anonymous Code Inline code can be added within text.
